tracking-[-0.02em] max-lg:mt-[100px] max-lg:text-5xl">Testimonials</div> <div class="mt-6 max-w-[590px] self-center text-center leading-[25.6px] text-gray-light/80">The future of game development with Upit. Our cutting-edge tool harnesses the power of generative AI to
        streamline game.</div> <div class="mt-12 flex w-[calc(100vw-var(--sidebar-left-space)+8px)] max-w-[100vw] flex-col items-center self-center max-lg:my-4 max-lg:mt-8"><div class="max-lg:no-scrollbar flex max-w-full snap-x snap-mandatory flex-row overflow-x-auto px-4"><div class="flex shrink-0 flex-row gap-4 [&amp;>*]:h-[350px] [&amp;>*]:max-w-[410px] [&amp;>*]:shrink-0 [&amp;>*]:max-sm:h-[420px] [&amp;>*]:max-sm:w-[calc(100vw-48px)]"><div class="flex snap-center flex-col gap-4 rounded-3xl border-2 border-[#252525] bg-[#25252580] p-6 backdrop-blur-sm"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-4"><div class="flex size-12 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-[#99D1B1]"><img alt="" src="/_app/immutable/assets/Profile5.D5NegUdr.jpg"></div> <div class="font-headline text-[18px] font-medium">Octo</div></div> <div class="text-left leading-[25.6px] text-gray-light/70">Upit is like a Swiss army knife for game development, transforming me into a one-man studio capable of producing and publishing games in less than a day.</div></div><!----> <div class="flex snap-center flex-col gap-4 rounded-3xl border-2 border-[#252525] bg-[#25252580] p-6 backdrop-blur-sm"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-4"><div class="flex size-12 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-[#99D1B1]"><img alt="" src="/_app/immutable/assets/Profile6.49Ro_34b.jpg"></div> <div class="font-headline text-[18px] font-medium">cSpark</div></div> <div class="text-left leading-[25.6px] text-gray-light/70">Upit makes it super fast, easy and fun to develop games. The AI suggests code and graphics based on your text prompts, and then gives you flexibility to edit, test and deploy your game online. I already made 14 little games in my off-hours during the past few months, and enjoyed the process.</div></div><!----> <div class="flex snap-center flex-col gap-4 rounded-3xl border-2 border-[#252525] bg-[#25252580] p-6 backdrop-blur-sm"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-4"><div class="flex size-12 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-[#99D1B1]"><img alt="" src="/_app/immutable/assets/Profile7.D0S2qG_1.jpg"></div> <div class="font-headline text-[18px] font-medium">Djam</div></div> <div class="text-left leading-[25.6px] text-gray-light/70">Upit has revolutionized my game development journey with intuitive tools, efficiency, and a supportive community.</div></div><!----> <div class="flex snap-center flex-col gap-4 rounded-3xl border-2 border-[#252525] bg-[#25252580] p-6 backdrop-blur-sm"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-4"><div class="flex size-12 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-[#99D1B1]"><img alt="" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"></div> <div class="font-headline text-[18px] font-medium">BBG on YT</div></div> <div class="text-left leading-[25.6px] text-gray-light/70">Upit has been an amazing experience for someone who has no game development skills. I have never made a real game before, since I did not have the skills to make games. But after discovering Upit, I was able to make fully functioning games with almost no issues. It has been a very creative tool that has allowed me to express my creativity in incredible ways.</div></div><!----> <div class="flex snap-center flex-col gap-4 rounded-3xl border-2 border-[#252525] bg-[#25252580] p-6 backdrop-blur-sm"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-4"><div class="flex size-12 items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-[#99D1B1]"><img alt="" src="/_app/immutable/assets/Profile9.XsKSSxmW.jpg"></div> <div class="font-headline text-[18px] font-medium">Nox</div></div> <div class="text-left leading-[25.6px] text-gray-light/70">Upit game creator is perfect for bringing your game ideas to life without any coding or game developer experience required. If you can think it, you can create it. And if ever you’re stuck, the tools and AI assistant are there to help you ignite your creativity and iterate with you along the way. Whether you’ve always dreamed of making your own game or just want to quickly prototype an idea, Upit makes it fun and easy.</div></div><!----></div></div></div> <div id="faq" class="mt-[164px] flex flex-row gap-12 max-lg:mt-[100px] max-lg:flex-col"><div class="flex flex-1 flex-col gap-8"><div class="font-headline text-[56px] leading-[61px] tracking-[-0.02em] max-lg:text-5xl max-lg:leading-[52px]">Frequently Asked Questions</div> <div class="leading-[25.6px] text-gray-light/80">Couldn't find what you were looking for?<br> write to us at <a class="text-accent" href="/up/feedback">upit.com/up/feedback</a></div></div> <div class="flex max-w-[635px] flex-1 flex-col gap-4"><div class="flex flex-col gap-6 rounded-3xl border-2 border-[#252525] bg-[#25252580] p-8 backdrop-blur-sm max-lg:p-4"><div class="text-left font-headline font-medium lg:text-2xl">What is Upit Game Creator?</div> <div class="text-left leading-[25.6px] text-gray-mid/80">Upit lets anyone create web-based games without technical expertise. It provides all the tools needed to turn your ideas into playable games, from visuals to sounds and beyond.</div></div><!----> <div class="flex flex-col gap-6 rounded-3xl border-2 border-[#252525] bg-[#25252580] p-8 backdrop-blur-sm max-lg:p-4"><div class="text-left font-headline font-medium lg:text-2xl">What kind of games can I create?</div> <div class="text-left leading-[25.6px] text-gray-mid/80">Currently, you can create 2D casual games. We're continuously expanding the possibilities—check out games made by other creators for inspiration.</div></div><!----> <div class="flex flex-col gap-6 rounded-3xl border-2 border-[#252525] bg-[#25252580] p-8 backdrop-blur-sm max-lg:p-4"><div class="text-left font-headline font-medium lg:text-2xl">How long does it typically take to get approved for Upit's creator program?</div> <div class="text-left leading-[25.6px] text-gray-mid/80">Applications are reviewed manually and typically take between 1-7 days, depending on demand.</div></div><!----> <div class="flex flex-col gap-6 rounded-3xl border-2 border-[#252525] bg-[#25252580] p-8 backdrop-blur-sm max-lg:p-4"><div class="text-left font-headline font-medium lg:text-2xl">Why does Upit have an acceptance process for its creator program?</div> <div class="text-left leading-[25.6px] text-gray-mid/80">To ensure a great experience for all creators, we carefully review applications. This helps maintain the quality of our platform and ensures resources are used effectively.</div></div><!----></div></div> <div class="mt-[164px] flex w-full flex-col rounded-3xl border-2 			<script>
				{
					const deferred = new Map();

					__sveltekit_1doen7i = {
						base: new URL("..", location).pathname.slice(0, -1),
						defer: (id) => new Promise((fulfil, reject) => {
							deferred.set(id, { fulfil, reject });
						}),
						resolve: ({ id, data, error }) => {
							const try_to_resolve = () => {
								if (!deferred.has(id)) {
									setTimeout(try_to_resolve, 0);
									return;
								}
								const { fulfil, reject } = deferred.get(id);
								deferred.delete(id);
								if (error) reject(error);
								else fulfil(data);
							}
							try_to_resolve();
						}
					};

					const element = document.currentScript.parentElement;

					Promise.all([
						import("../_app/immutable/entry/start.l5fjE1QX.js"),
						import("../_app/immutable/entry/app.D5kPhl1g.js")
					]).then(([kit, app]) => {
						kit.start(app, element, {
							node_ids: [0, 3, 62],
